name: synapse
description: Synapse: Paseo + Synapse 融合 - AI 开发操作系统
author: haodafa

scripts.dev:server: npm run build:deps && concurrently --kill-others --names protocol,client,unified --prefix-colors yellow,blue,cyan "npm run watch:protocol" "npm run watch:client" "npm run dev:unified:raw"
scripts.build:client: npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@synapse/client
scripts.build:unified-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:client
scripts.build:unified: npm run build:unified-deps && npm run build --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon && npm run build --workspace=@synapse/cli
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:client && npm run build --workspace=packages/expo-two-way-audio
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:app-deps && npm run build:unified-deps && npm run build --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon && cd packages/app && cross-env SYNAPSE_WEB_PLATFORM=electron npx expo export --platform web && cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=@synapse/desktop --
scripts.typecheck:unified: npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/cli
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/protocol && npm run build:client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/client && npm run build:unified && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace=@synapse/cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/protocol && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/cli
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/protocol --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/client --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@synapse/cli --access public
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@synapse/highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@synapse/relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@synapse/protocol --access public && npm publish --workspace=@synapse/client --access public && npm publish --workspace=@synapse/unified-daemon --access public && npm publish --workspace=@synapse/cli --access public
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:patch && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:minor && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:major && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:next && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
